metadata.title:
Through the columns of
The Press last night, James
Walsh made the first an
nouncement of the clearing

The Milwaukee and Local
Railroad Situation.

pages.raw_text:
ing the entrance of the Chicago Milwaukee & ST. Paul
railroad into this city, and the full plans concerning the
proposition.


The Milwaukee road will have its big depot at Front
and Washington streets The depots of the three
great nes-the Northern Pacific, Great Northern and
Milwaukee, will be nearly abreast of each other at differ
ent points in the business section Two three blocks
west of the Milwaukee depot Front avenue the depot
of the North Coast road which may may not be the
Canadian Pacific will be located Front will be
transformed into great railroad thoroughfare.


The coming of these great roads to Spokane the
doubling of Spokanes population within the next five
years. and the development of the greatest distributing
not be finer Citizens should do everything reasonable to
help along the situation because that will help themselves
On the other hand all necessary regulations regarding
should be insisted upon and railroads here should be
made to eliminate all bad street crossings by elevatng
their tracks.
